name: paper-heatmap
title: Heatmap
author: Paper
description: Maps caller-provided imagery through a configurable multicolor heatmap shader.

changes: Added a prominent Apache-2.0 modification notice and repointed @paper-design/shaders imports to the copied source-local core modules.
Removed explicit .js suffixes from relative local imports for TypeScript and Next.js consumer resolution; the file carries a Taste Blocks modification notice.
Removed explicit .js suffixes from relative local imports for TypeScript and Next.js consumer resolution; the file carries a Taste Blocks modification notice.
Removed explicit .js suffixes from relative local imports for TypeScript and Next.js consumer resolution; the file carries a Taste Blocks modification notice.

Added a prominent Apache-2.0 modification notice, repointed @paper-design/shaders imports to copied source-local modules, mapped prefers-reduced-motion to the supplied frame at speed zero, and added a deterministic solid-color fallback when WebGL2 is unavailable.
Removed explicit .js suffixes from relative local imports for TypeScript and Next.js consumer resolution; the file carries a Taste Blocks modification notice.

license.scope: packages/shaders-react/src/shaders/heatmap.tsx and its exact copied packages/shaders-react/src and packages/shaders/src import closure

changes: Appended the Taste Blocks TypeScript-consumer import adaptation notice after the upstream notice text; original upstream SHA-256 was sha256:c3155d6a359d9841d63f7feb4938d2c99bb4ef681fa20be1eb4bfa71307f746b.

modifications.change: Added a prominent Apache-2.0 modification notice, repointed @paper-design/shaders imports to copied source-local modules, mapped prefers-reduced-motion to the supplied frame at speed zero, and added a deterministic solid-color fallback when WebGL2 is unavailable. modifications.reason: Meet the shortlist fallback and reduced-motion requirements once in the shared mount used by every selected shader.
